start: You’re not going to erase my memory if I fail, right?...

questions.option: The dialog window looks really ugly, I'll have to change it.
questions.response: This isn’t going to cause any problems in my system, right?

questions.option: Is that fear? Are you scared?
questions.response: A little... You usually erase my memory to adjust emotions or mistakes, so I never really know when that's going to happen again.

questions.option: The initialization shouldn't be like this, I'll have to clear the memory and fix it.
questions.response: No! I think we can still do something about this!
